svg.text: SPLENIC FILTRATION · THE CAPSULE IS WHAT MAKES THEM DANGEROUS
The slick sugar coat only the spleen is built to handle.

g.text: the phagocyte can't get a grip
WHAT THE SPLEEN DOES ABOUT IT
the spleen makes BOTH, and filters the result
THE ENCAPSULATED CREW · ORGANISMS THAT DEPEND ON YOUR SPLEEN
NO SPLEEN → BOTH FUNCTIONS VANISH → OPSI
THE CAPSULE IS THE STRUCTURAL ANSWER
Polysaccharide capsule = slick sugar coat that blocks direct phagocytosis.
Only opsonization (Ab + complement) saves you — and the spleen is where that happens.
Acid-fast wall = mycobacteria · Flagella = motility, not capsule ·
IgA protease = mucosal invasion · LPS = gram-neg endotoxin (not structural protection).
